description:
StreakRep is a strength training app for building workout plans, logging every set, and seeing whether you are actually getting stronger.

Built for the gym or home training, StreakRep turns your weekly plan into a clear workout flow: know what to train today, which exercises to do, which weight and reps to record, how long to rest, and how your performance changes over time.

BUILD PLANS THAT FIT YOU
Set your goal, experience level, weekly training days, location, and available equipment. StreakRep helps you organize strength, hypertrophy, body recomposition, or general fitness routines with editable exercises, sets, rep ranges, and rest times.

LOG WORKOUTS WITHOUT FRICTION
During a session, mark sets as complete, adjust weight and reps, manage rest timers, add notes, and stay focused between exercises. Your history is saved so the next workout starts with useful context.

UNDERSTAND YOUR PROGRESS
Review volume, streaks, consistency, personal records, estimated 1RM, progressive overload, and exercise-level trends. The muscle map helps you see which areas you are training and where fatigue or imbalance may be building up.

CONNECT YOUR TRAINING ECOSYSTEM
StreakRep integrates with Apple Health to read and write compatible metrics such as body weight, height, activity, and workouts when you give permission. It also supports Apple Watch, widgets, and Live Activities so you can follow your workout outside the app.

FOR PEOPLE WHO TRAIN WITH INTENT
Ideal for lifters and fitness users who want to stop improvising, progress with data, and stay consistent without spreadsheets or complicated tools.

StreakRep Pro unlocks advanced features such as expanded analytics, configurable progression, automatic backups, share cards, and premium training tools.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Plan workouts, log every set, and understand your progress with clear strength metrics.
